title: RN-F must wait for RespSepData and at least one packet of DataSepResp before sending CompAck.
requirement: RN-F must wait for RespSepData and at least one packet of DataSepResp before sending CompAck.

title: HN-F must not send next ordered request to SN-F until receiving CompAck.
forbidden: HN-F must not send next ordered request to SN-F until receiving CompAck.
